name: provenance manifest validator rejects a freshness_at_generation value outside the four-value enum
command: printf '{"standards_state":{"x":{"freshness_at_generation":"made-up"}}}\n' > prov.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-provenance-manifest.sh" --manifest prov.json --check freshness-enum 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_freshness=made-up' err.txt && grep -q 'allowed=fresh-within-fetch-frequency|stale-warn-degraded|offline-cached|operator-bypass' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
